IOGC 2026 National Seminar

Explore Downtown STL

Experience the heart of Saint Louis with riverfront views, historic landmarks, and a few of the city's most memorable downtown stops.

Downtown STL Map
📍 Overview
Downtown Saint Louis is located along the Mississippi River and is home to some of the city's most iconic landmarks. This area is a short ride from the hotel and gives visitors a chance to enjoy the riverfront, local history, and signature city views.
Key Distances and Locations:
  • From Downtown hotel area: Most of these stops are roughly a 5–10 minute drive depending on traffic and parking.
  • From Forest Park: Roughly a 10–15 minute drive east via I-64 / Hwy 40.
  • From St. Louis Airport (STL): Roughly a 15–20 minute drive via I-70 East.
Downtown Saint Louis riverfront area including the Gateway Arch, Old Courthouse, and Riverboats
🏙️ Explore Downtown Saint Louis and enjoy a few signature stops along the riverfront.
Here are the Three Excursions that the Saints in Saint Louis recommending in Downtown
🌉
Gateway Arch ← click to explore
Iconic landmark • riverfront views
Visit the famous Gateway Arch and enjoy one of the best views in Saint Louis. Guests can explore the museum below, walk the grounds, and ride the tram to the top for a memorable look over the city and the Mississippi River.

Hours: Visitor areas are open daily from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. The park grounds are open from 5:00 AM to 11:00 PM.
🏛️
Old Courthouse ← click to explore
Historic site • downtown landmark
Step into a meaningful part of American history at the Old Courthouse. It is known for its beautiful architecture and for its connection to important court cases, making it a worthwhile stop for visitors who enjoy history and heritage.

Hours: Open daily from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
🚢
Riverboat Cruise ← click to explore
Relaxing ride • Mississippi River
Enjoy a scenic cruise on the Mississippi River and take in downtown Saint Louis from the water. It is a relaxing way to experience the riverfront and can be a great option for fellowship, photos, and enjoying the city from a different view.

Hours: Riverboat cruises are seasonal and departure times vary, so it is best to check the day’s sailing schedule before going.
💡
Quick pointers
  • These downtown excursions are close to each other and can often be enjoyed together in one outing.
  • Parking is available nearby, though some lots and garages may charge a fee.
  • It is a good idea to check Arch tram and riverboat times in advance before heading downtown.
  • Comfortable walking shoes are recommended since some attractions are best enjoyed on foot once you arrive.
Directions Back to the Hotel
🏨
Renaissance St. Louis Airport Hotel 9801 Natural Bridge Road, St. Louis, MO 63134
🚗
Driving directions
From downtown Saint Louis, make your way to I-70 West toward St. Louis Lambert International Airport. Continue westbound, then take the exit area for Natural Bridge Road near the airport. Follow Natural Bridge Road to the Renaissance St. Louis Airport Hotel at 9801 Natural Bridge Road, St. Louis, MO 63134.

Estimated drive time is about 20–25 minutes, depending on traffic.
